user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the quadrant rating frequency, so that ratings are collected on the intended cycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Quadrant Rating screen; When I set the rating frequency; Then it is saved as the rating cycle

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define when the rating period should start, so that rating windows open at the right time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Quadrant Rating screen; When I set when the rating should start; Then the rating start point is saved

user_story: As a Manager, I want a reminder to provide ratings a set number of days after the start date, so that I do not miss the rating window
acceptance_criteria: Given a rating cycle is configured; When I set the reminder days after rating start date; Then reminders are scheduled accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to require ratings to be given within a set number of days after the start date, so that ratings are completed on time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Quadrant Rating screen; When I set the number of days within which a rating must be given; Then that deadline is enforced

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the quadrant rating settings, so that the configuration takes effect
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured the rating settings; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the settings are persisted
